For Claude Code
claude-papercuts
Ten Claude Code skills that fix bugs Anthropic closed as "not planned."
01unclearundo /clear
06compact-guardsave plan before compact
02done-proververify Claude's "done"
07safe-shellblock reckless commands
03skill-budgetaudit invisible skills
08onboardcurated starter set
04amnesia-fixcross-session memory
09skill-doctorlint your SKILL.md
05token-x-rayfind context bloat
10subagent-brokerparallel task dispatch
MIT licensed No telemetry Open source
